title: Tangy Velvety Saudi Arabian Tripe Stew
description: A traditional Saudi Arabian dish featuring tender tripe in a rich and tangy stew, served with crispy toast and fresh vegetables. This kid-friendly recipe is perfect for a warm and comforting meal.

ingredients.name: tripe
ingredients.notes: cleaned and cut into small pieces

instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large pot over medium heat.
Add the chopped onions and cook until they are translucent, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional 1 minute.
Add the tripe and cook until it is browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the tomato paste, lemon juice, cumin, paprika, salt, and black pepper. Stir well to combine.
Add 2 cups of water to the pot and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, for 1 1/2 hours, or until the tripe is tender.
While the stew is cooking, toast the bread cubes until they are crispy.
Serve the stew hot, garnished with toasted bread and fresh vegetables.
Offer a side of raw vegetables, such as carrots and cucumbers, for a raw-friendly option.
